# Standard Delivery

Acme Shop offers a Standard Delivery option that guarantees reliable shipping within 3 to 7 business days after dispatch, which occurs within 24 to 48 hours of order confirmation. Shipping costs start at $5.99 for domestic orders, but free delivery is available for orders over $50. For international shipments, delivery may take up to 10 to 14 business days and additional charges may apply. Most products qualify for Standard Delivery, although oversized items may have restrictions or incur extra fees.

[Source: shipping_options.md#standard-delivery]
